sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109114" key="u(posimo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποσῑμ-όω</orth>, <sense id="n109114.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">curve</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bend upwards a little,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:1:39" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.39</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
